name: soapysdr0.8-module-all
title: soapysdr0.8-module-all
description:
All device support for SoapySDR (metapackage)
SoapySDR is a library providing a common interface to SDR (software
defined radio) hardware. Support for different hardware is added through
external modules.
.
This dependency package pulls in all available device support module packages.
You can remove this package if you prefer to pick and choose modules to
install.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-all because All device support for SoapySDR (metapackage).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-all as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-all with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-all --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
